Abel Golddust Exchange

where dust becomes gold — through the art of exchange

dust ◆ gold

A platform where your unused belongings find new purpose. What gathers dust on your shelf could be someone else's most cherished find. Exchange. Donate. Trade. Reuse.

One person's old item is another person's treasure.
Nothing is useless — give it a second life.

The Journey
The Process

How Gold Finds its Owner

01
List Your Dust

Upload items you no longer need — clothes, books, electronics, furniture. What feels like dust to you holds hidden gold for another.

02
Connect & Match

Browse the exchange. Connect with members in your community. Propose a trade, a gift, or a donation — the choice is yours.

03
Exchange & Thrive

Complete the exchange and watch something old become someone's treasure. Reduce waste. Save money. Build community.

About the Platform

Built on the belief that nothing useful should go to waste.

Abel Goldust Exchange was born from a simple insight: one person's discarded item is often exactly what another person needs. By connecting people within communities, we create a circular economy of generosity and sustainability.

The name says it all — Gold + Dust. What is dust for you could be gold for someone else. The magic happens in the exchange.

We promote recycling, reduce unnecessary consumption, and help build a more supportive, sustainable society — right here in Ethiopia and beyond.

Abel Tigistu Ashenafi
Founder · Developer · HU
